ticket.subject: RE: Final Reminder: FedEx REST API Migration for Shopify — Deadline Is Days Away
ticket.raw_subject: RE: Final Reminder: FedEx REST API Migration for Shopify — Deadline Is Days Away
ticket.description:
Hi

 

Can you give me help in setting up the new app with my existing details?

 

Thanks

 

Ryan Read

POP Display UK Limited

 

T:   +44 1708 689520

W: popdisplay.co.uk (http://www.popdisplay.co.uk/) (NEW!)

L:   linkedin.com/company/pop-display-uk-ltd (https://www.linkedin.com/company/pop-display-uk-ltd)

 

POP Display UK Limited, Unit 1a Brunel Road, Manor Trading Estate, Benfleet, Essex, SS7 4PS

 

 

From: Madhuri <madhuri@pluginhive.com>
Sent: 06 May 2026 15:37
To: Ryan @ POP <ryan@popdisplay.co.uk>
Subject: Final Reminder: FedEx REST API Migration for Shopify — Deadline Is Days Away

 

PluginHive

FedEx Certified Compatible Solution Provider

Final Reminder — Please Complete Your Migration

Deadline: June 1, 2026

Hi there,

FedEx Web Services retirement began on April 1, 2026. While the transition is already in progress, we’ve secured an extension for our customers until June 1, 2026. If you haven’t migrated your Shopify FedEx app  "P (https://followup.pluginhive.com/e/1105462/fedex-shipping/j4jfs2/1147973959/h/9vRyL1kruX7zrQQwLakTT3SinkNKnVxT69gYrl1UiJg) H Ship, Rate & Track for FedEx (https://followup.pluginhive.com/e/1105462/fedex-shipping/j4jfs2/1147973959/h/9vRyL1kruX7zrQQwLakTT3SinkNKnVxT69gYrl1UiJg) " to REST APIs, your shipping rates, label generation, and tracking may be affected once the transition takes effect.

If you have already migrated, you can ignore this mail.

 

What You Need to Do — It Takes Minutes

Open your Shopify app settings, complete the REST API registration using your FedEx account details, validate your account (via SMS, email, phone, invoice, or Help Desk), and your new credentials are configured automatically. Run a quick test — and you're done.

 

Need Help? We'll Do It With You.

Reply now and our team will guide you step by step — at no extra charge.

Contact Support Now

Or simply reply to this email for immediate assistance.

 

A few minutes is all it takes to keep your FedEx shipping running smoothly on Shopify. We're ready to help whenever you need us.

Best regards,

The PluginHive Team

FedEx Certified Compatible Solution Provider

support@pluginhive.com

You're receiving this email because you use a PluginHive FedEx shipping app for Shopify.

If you no longer wish to hear from us, please unsubscribe (https://followup.pluginhive.com/unsubscribeConfirm/1105462/e5068442f0d53594171fbc2ce79223d3bad1bf9ce098dfcae5a24883d9933a85/1147973959) here.

**From:** Madhuri <madhuri@pluginhive.com>
 **Sent:** 06 May 2026 15:37
 **To:** Ryan @ POP <ryan@popdisplay.co.uk>
 **Subject:** Final Reminder: FedEx REST API Migration for Shopify — Deadline Is Days Away



**PluginHive**

FedEx Certified Compatible Solution Provider

**Final Reminder — Please Complete Your Migration**

**Deadline: June 1, 2026**

Hi there,

FedEx Web Services retirement began on **April 1, 2026**. While the transition is already in progress, we’ve secured an extension for our customers until **June 1, 2026**. If you haven’t migrated your Shopify FedEx app  "**PH Ship, Rate & Track for FedEx"** to REST APIs, your shipping rates, label generation, and tracking may be affected once the transition takes effect.

 **If you have already migrated, you can ignore this mail**.



**What You Need to Do — It Takes Minutes**

Open your Shopify app settings, complete the REST API registration using your FedEx account details, validate your account (via SMS, email, phone, invoice, or Help Desk), and your new credentials are configured automatically. Run a quick test — and you're done.



**Need Help? We'll Do It With You.**

Reply now and our team will guide you step by step — at no extra charge.

**Contact Support Now**

Or simply **reply to this email** for immediate assistance.



A few minutes is all it takes to keep your FedEx shipping running smoothly on Shopify. We're ready to help whenever you need us.

Best regards,

**The PluginHive Team**

FedEx Certified Compatible Solution Provider

support@pluginhive.com

comments.body:
Hello Ryan,

Thank you for reaching out with your query.

I tried reaching you on +44 1708 689520 but was not able to connect.

For FedEx REST API migration on the **PH Ship Rate and Track for FedEx** app, you will have to add your FedEx Account again.

For adding your FedEx account on the newly installed **PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label** App, you can simply go through the process being shown in the app.

Before you begin with REST API migration, **please keep the following handy and refer to the attached documents**:

- **FedEx Account Number**
- **Billing Address**
- **Latest FedEx Invoice ID**

Once these details are ready, the migration process only takes a few minutes:


1. Open the app settings in Shopify
2. Complete the REST API registration using your FedEx account details
3. Validate your account (SMS, email, phone, invoice, or Help Desk verification)
4. Your new credentials will then be configured automatically

_**Video Walkthrough for REST API migration:**_ _**https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ullkZ5v7eYc**_
_**Reference Documentation :**_ _**https://www.pluginhive.com/migrate-shopify-store-to-fedex-rest-api/#integration-through-ph-ship-rate-track**_
After setup, run a quick test to confirm everything is working correctly.

Once you've completed the migration, request you to kindly **reply to this email and confirm to us.** It helps us ensure everything is in order on your account.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ryan,
 
Thank you for reaching out with your query.
 
I tried reaching you on +44 1708 689520 but was not able to connect.
 
For FedEx REST API migration on the PH Ship Rate and Track for FedEx app, you will have to add your FedEx Account again.
 
For adding your FedEx account on the newly installed PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App, you can simply go through the process being shown in the app.
 
Before you begin with REST API migration, please keep the following handy and refer to the attached documents:
 
  • FedEx Account Number
  • Billing Address
  • Latest FedEx Invoice ID
Once these details are ready, the migration process only takes a few minutes:
 
  1. Open the app settings in Shopify
  2. Complete the REST API registration using your FedEx account details
  3. Validate your account (SMS, email, phone, invoice, or Help Desk verification)
  4. Your new credentials will then be configured automatically
Video Walkthrough for REST API migration: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ullkZ5v7eYc
Reference Documentation : https://www.pluginhive.com/migrate-shopify-store-to-fedex-rest-api/#integration-through-ph-ship-rate-track
After setup, run a quick test to confirm everything is working correctly.
 
Once you've completed the migration, request you to kindly reply to this email and confirm to us. It helps us ensure everything is in order on your account.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Ryan,

The verification code is sent by FedEx to your email/phone which is officially registered with FedEx.

If you are not getting the verification code, you can use INVOICE as the validation type and use information from a recent FedEx billing Invoice to validate the details.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ryan,
 
The verification code is sent by FedEx to your email/phone which is officially registered with FedEx.
 
If you are not getting the verification code, you can use INVOICE as the validation type and use information from a recent FedEx billing Invoice to validate the details.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

Hello Ryan,

If you are referring about the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app, then I can observe that the FedEx account is successfully added in the app.

Additionally, the app subscription will remain active as long as the app is installed on your store.

Could you please share your exact requirements and let us know which app you will be using so that we can assist you accordingly?

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Ryan,

To stop the subscription for the PH Ship Rate and Track for FedEx app, you will have to uninstall it from your store.

Also, both the app are standalone apps and nothing will be transferred from one app to another.

You will have to setup the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app from start as per your requirement. You can refer to the app documentation to take assistance in setting up the app - https://www.pluginhive.com/knowledge-base/setting-up-shopify-multi-carrier-shipping-label-app/

Let us know if you have any further queries.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ryan,
 
To stop the subscription for the PH Ship Rate and Track for FedEx app, you will have to uninstall it from your store.
 
Also, both the app are standalone apps and nothing will be transferred from one app to another.
 
You will have to setup the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app from start as per your requirement. You can refer to the app documentation to take assistance in setting up the app - https://www.pluginhive.com/knowledge-base/setting-up-shopify-multi-carrier-shipping-label-app/
 
Let us know if you have any further queries.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

Hello Ryan,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** from 0fe327-d5.myshopify.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.

> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive

Hello Ryan,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on 0fe327-d5.myshopify.com

comments.body:
L3:  https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1779800759446829
MCSL customer is inquiring about live tracking feature, he is on a $9 plan.

The customer was previously using the PH Ship, Rate & Track for FedEx app and has recently migrated to the MCSL app. The customer is currently on the $9 plan and has generated 8 labels so far in May, with 9 orders in the last 14 days.

On the website pricing page, the $9 plan mentions that live tracking updates are available. Could you please suggest whether we can enable the live tracking feature for this customer?

Store URL: 0fe327-d5.myshopify.com
Ac ID: 0fe327-d5.myshopify.com
Active from : 2024-08-16
